description_long: This house features a prominent stone and wood facade with three steeply pitched gable roofs at the front, each adorned with large rectangular windows. The entryway is marked by a small arched portico supported by classical columns, leading to a recessed main door. The exterior walls combine stonework on the lower level and wood shingles on the upper sections, creating a visually rich texture. The rear of the house includes a large covered patio area supported by columns, extending over a green lawn. Circular attic windows and a tall stone chimney add architectural interest to the roofline. The overall design is symmetrical and stately, with a blend of traditional and modern elements.
description: A stately two-story house with steep gable roofs, stone and wood exterior, large windows, and a columned entryway. The rear features a spacious covered patio and green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing three steep gable roofs, large windows, stone and wood facade, and a columned arched entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stonework, wood shingles, and the depth of the house, with the covered patio visible to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large covered patio supported by columns, green lawn, and the back entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone and wood exterior, rooflines, and the extension of the patio area.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entry with classical columns, small porch, and stone steps
